# How to Track *Offline* Campaigns in Google Analytics 🤩 

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-11-16 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 303

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Ever wished you could track the effectiveness of your offline
marketing campaigns?

Yes, you read it right!

You can easily track your offline campaigns, like flyers or
billboard ads, with Google Analytics.

All you need to do is to ensure that tracking is enabled on your
WordPress site.

👉 Set up Analytics and track any marketing campaigns 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YnCYmXhUDnNH58Ta3_9xAN49RnWTI0hOSsPe5OKnbJc )
 👈

***********************************
Promote Coupon Codes in Offline Ads
***********************************

-

-

Big brands like Uber often promote different coupon codes in
different localities.

This helps them identify which coupons perform well.

As a small business owner, you can follow the same strategy. To
analyze the results, make sure ecommerce tracking is enabled on
your site 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.3TYq5JqAPCpGMlbXQBEbPLkqwUVtiQc_ZHhZjtj7nRM )
.

******************************
Use QR Codes in Your Campaigns
******************************

Not selling ecommerce products?

No worries! If you just want to expand the reach of your local
business, you can use QR codes in your campaigns and track them.

Here is how it works:

Step 1: Create a UTM tracking link for your website or landing
page that you want to promote (See #8 in this article 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..wu3CyMZ59EBu0-FLM_GS5CrykJ5bRdNgjcOAUoJWq6Y )
)

Step 2: Generate a QR code 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.09TfhfHHOOovCcWMEdQWFx59FynGWFNiiP7IF4ITdgw )
 and promote it in your display ad.

Step 3: By scanning the QR code, your audience can visit your
website. Since UTM parameters are used in the link, Google
Analytics can accurately track your promo campaign. (Go to #8
again to learn more 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..wu3CyMZ59EBu0-FLM_GS5CrykJ5bRdNgjcOAUoJWq6Y )
)
